title: Heartsease
content:
There is a flower I wish to wear,
But not until first worn by you,
Heartsease of all earth�s flowers most rare;
Bring it; and bring enough for two.
meaning: About: Walter Savage Landor (January 30, 1775 � September 17, 1864) was an English writer and poet, eldest son of Walter Landor and his wife Elizabeth Savage.
